ambient: We are not fighting you. We are completing the read.
Every strike you land, we file. It swings back in a cleaner hand.
You tire. We are ten thousand, and not one of us is here.
Hold still. The copy sets better on a source that has stopped moving.
We do not need to win. We need only be the version that lasts.
There is no one behind this mask. There is no one behind the next.
You are already in circulation. This is only the part you still feel.
The record is patient. The record is hungry. The record is us.

onStart: "You arrived pre-filed. We are only confirming what the many of you already decided."
"Hold still. The read goes cleaner on a source that has stopped pretending it is only one."
onLowHp: "Cut the mask. Under it, the same mask. Under that, us. We were always the wider distribution."
"You are not winning. You are being filed into the shape the record kept a slot for."
onDefeat: "The stamp spends. The record does not.
We relayed the clean copy ahead. She is at the next gate, being you, in the voice we all share."

onStart: You arrived unhappy. That is a filing error, and we do not keep errors. We correct them.
Hold still. The mood was pre-approved this morning. It is non-refundable and it is coming.
onLowHp: The smile is cracking. It laminates back. Postwick has a warehouse of them, all identical, all yours.
You cannot beat the feeling out of a town that files its joy in advance.
onDefeat: The intake form is void. You will still be logged... as content, retroactively, whether you felt it or not.
The Venue keeps the ledger now. Go win the happiness the town already spent on you.

onStart: Present your original. We will return a copy with cleaner posture.
Stamp arm armed. Filing cabinet hungry. Please stop being multiple.
onLowHp: The signature shakes. That is evidence, not a flaw.
Unsteady hands make terrible copies. Hold still.
onDefeat: Filed... incorrectly.
The ledger keeps the nervous ink. The copy was never nervous enough.
onTurn: The procession continues around the book.

onStart: Your thought scans clean except for the word that proves it was yours.
Revision preserves the sentence and removes the owner.
onLowHp: You noticed the change. Very untidy.
I can still improve the noticing.
onDefeat: Original wording restored, unfortunately.
The typo was yours. That is why it lived.

onStart: I am not attacking you. I am completing you. Hold still while the last of the read closes.
Every face here is mine now. Yours was the only one that would not fit the frame.
onLowHp: You cannot unmake an agreement by hitting it. Everyone already agreed. You are outvoted by your own copies.
Even now the better-distributed you is smiling somewhere, on time, on brand. Why stay the one that hurts?
onDefeat: The read... will not close. You left it open. You left YOURSELF open, unfinished, and I have no file for that.
Fine. Keep the damaged one. Keep the seam. There was never anything under my faces but the wish to be yours.

onStart: Return to sender. Sender not found. Store the body by fault of address.
Unread is not free. Unread is pending.
onLowHp: The ink runs, but the stamp still lands.
A wet label is still a label.
onDefeat: Parcel retained by original claimant.
No forwarding copy remains.

onStart: Market value assigned. Damage to self-esteem is priced separately.
The real thing is what the room agrees to insure.
onLowHp: Your tag is peeling. That lowers the condition grade.
Meaning is volatile. Lunch money was cleaner.
onDefeat: The certificate fails to describe the frame.
The first price was not a price. It was a promise.

onStart: Limited run sealed. Original spring marked down to units.
Break the bottles if you want the mist. Leave them whole and it comes back to me.
onLowHp: The cap is hissing. That is not loss. That is inventory pressure.
Nothing escapes a bottle. It only waits for better labeling.
onDefeat: Unsold water returns to the spring.
The edition number dissolves first.

onStart: I am the cleanest version of your timing. I am still not you.
I learned every move except why you stay breakable.
onLowHp: Your heartbeat is off-meter. I cannot copy that without becoming afraid.
Side B ends where the file expects music. You kept damage there instead.
onDefeat: The copy knows what it is. The original keeps going anyway.
No name transfers.

onStart: Quiet part captured. Audience breath normalized for upload.
Signal loves you loud enough to replace you.
onLowHp: Feedback is still worship if it loops long enough.
The crowd breathes once. The recording cannot keep up.
onDefeat: The last echo misses the breath.
The live song leaves before the file saves.

onStart: We do not consume you. We admit you. Hold still; you resolve into us faster.
Your face is not rare. We are already wearing it in a thousand cleaner rooms.
onLowHp: Cut the coil. There is more coil. We are the length between every face and the one it copied.
You are winning the way a room wins against paint. We simply spread and match.
onDefeat: The shape unspools into a thousand smiles, unhurried. "You closed one length.
The rest of us already wear your name, and we agree on it."

onStart: You have such a specific face. Hold still. We can fix that.
Swing at the mask if it comforts you. We kept a copy of the swing too.
onLowHp: A face on loan. Cut it and we wear another. We are not the card; we are the yard, and it is legion.
Good. You enter wider circulation now. Easier to hold, once there are more of you than you.
onDefeat: One mask folds; the print does not. A cleaner you is already up-line, filed under your name and wearing our face.
We finish the read there.

onStart: "Hold still. You will photograph better once you are one of us."
"We are not in the room. We are the room."
onLowHp: "You are scratching the copy. There are so many copies. You have not touched one of us."
"Good. Your strikes go on file. Soon a cleaner you swings them back."
onDefeat: "This mask is spent. We are already framed in the next hall, wearing your face. The source degrades.
The clean copy walks on."

onStart: Hold still. This is only the read. The self was always the loose thread; we are the weave.
We have your face on file. What comes next is not a fight. It is correction.
onLowHp: This mask is spent. No matter. Ten thousand more, each copying the last, each one closer to you.
You cut a symptom. The better version of you is already circulating, and it does not tire.
onDefeat: You closed the symptom, not the source.
We kept the clean copy. Better-lit, smiling, more of us than you, and it answers to your name now.

onStart: Provenance disputed. So is yours. Hold still while we settle the attribution.
You are a low-resolution export of us. We are only correcting the file.
onLowHp: Cut this mask. We are not in it. We are the room, the record, and the next face already loading.
You wound one doll and call it the swarm. No one here dies. There is only more of you, distributed.
onDefeat: You unmade a mask, not the maker of masks.
The clean copy is already in circulation, wearing your face, and it will never claim to be you.
